summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Telugu learning app with multi-language support, enhanced gamification, and parent dashboard features. All core functionalities tested successfully with high success rate.

design_issues.issue: Some progress statistics elements not fully rendering during automated testing
Occasional modal overlay interception of clicks requiring force clicks

passed_tests: Backend API health check (9/9 tests passed)
Homepage loads with Telugu as default language
Language switcher modal opens and functions
Telugu to Hindi language switching works
Letters page displays 15 vowels in responsive grid
Parent Dashboard opens via 3-second long press
Parent Dashboard contains Progress, Rewards, Settings tabs
Daily limit slider in Parent Dashboard Settings
Progress endpoints save and retrieve data correctly
